plugins.name: ielts-reading-review
plugins.description: IELTS Academic Reading review skill — offline-first, generates structured review data (JSON) + professional HTML/PDF review notes locally. 12-category error analysis, synonym tracking, vocabulary tagging (538 keywords + COCA 5000), recurring mistake detection, fill-in-the-blank readback checklist, score-to-band conversion. v3.1 adds explicit Web hand-off: upload the generated JSON to https://tuyaya.online/ielts/submit.html to sync scores, vocabulary and synonyms to cloud. 雅思阅读复盘助手：纯离线生成复盘数据(JSON)+HTML+PDF，12类错因分析、同义替换积累、考点词标注、易错模式追踪、填空回填检查、打分换算。v3.1 新增Web端 JSON 上传对接。
